title: pelargonium × domesticum
intro: Pelargonium × domesticum, commonly known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Pelargonium, characterized by its fragrant pink or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Rose Geranium lie in its essential oils, which contain compounds like geraniol and linalool, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
